occupation_definition: Cut, grind, and polish eyeglasses, contact lenses, or other precision optical elements. Assemble and mount lenses into frames or process other optical elements. Includes precision lens polishers or grinders, centerer-edgers, and lens mounters. Excludes “Opticians, Dispensing ” (29-2081).

breadcrumb.occupation_title: Dental and Ophthalmic Laboratory Technicians and Medical Appliance Technicians
